---
title: "Extended Data Figure 5 — GLP1R/Lepr-KO dataset overview"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r setup_libraries_data}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

BASE_SIZE <- 8
out_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/ed_fig5/")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

targets::tar_config_set(store = here::here("_targets"))
targets::tar_load(arc_glp1rko_labeled)
```

## Panel a — UMAP colored by predicted celltype

```{r umap_celltype}
p_ct <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, reduction = "ref.umap", group.by = "predicted.celltype", label = TRUE,
                label.size = 2, repel = TRUE, shuffle = TRUE) +
    theme_void() + coord_equal() + NoLegend() + ggtitle("Predicted cell type")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_umap_celltype.pdf"), plot = p_ct, h = 5, w = 6)
```

## Panel b — UMAP colored by genotype

```{r umap_geno}
p_geno <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, reduction = "ref.umap", group.by = "geno", shuffle = TRUE,
                  cols = c("wt" = "grey70", "mut" = "#C0392B")) +
    theme_void() + coord_equal() + ggtitle("Genotype")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_umap_geno.pdf"), plot = p_geno, h = 4, w = 5)
```

## Panel c — UMAP colored by diet

```{r umap_diet}
p_diet <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, reduction = "ref.umap", group.by = "diet", shuffle = TRUE,
                  cols = c("Chow" = "#F0AD74", "DIO" = "#E8682F")) +
    theme_void() + coord_equal() + ggtitle("Diet")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_umap_diet.pdf"), plot = p_diet, h = 4, w = 5)
```

## Panel d — UMAP colored by sex

```{r umap_sex}
p_sex <- DimPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, reduction = "ref.umap", group.by = "sex", shuffle = TRUE) +
    theme_void() + coord_equal() + ggtitle("Sex")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_umap_sex.pdf"), plot = p_sex, h = 4, w = 5)
```

## Panel e — QC violins

```{r qc_violins, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
p_umi <- VlnPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, features = "nCount_RNA",
                  group.by = "hash.mcl.ID", pt.size = 0) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 5),
          legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "UMI counts") + ggtitle(NULL)

p_genes <- VlnPlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, features = "nFeature_RNA",
                    group.by = "hash.mcl.ID", pt.size = 0) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 5),
          legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Genes detected") + ggtitle(NULL)

p_qc <- p_umi / p_genes
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_qc_violins.pdf"), plot = p_qc, h = 6, w = 10)
```

## Panel f — Cell composition by genotype × diet

```{r composition, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
p_comp <- arc_glp1rko_labeled[[]] %>%
    count(predicted.celltype, geno, diet) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = predicted.celltype, y = n, fill = interaction(geno, diet))) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge", color = "white", linewidth = 0.1) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, size = 5)) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of cells", fill = "Geno.Diet")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_composition.pdf"), plot = p_comp, h = 4, w = 10)
```

## Panel g — Mapping confidence

```{r mapping_score}
p_score <- FeaturePlot(arc_glp1rko_labeled, reduction = "ref.umap", features = "predicted.celltype.score",
                       order = TRUE) +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
    theme_void() + coord_equal() + ggtitle("Mapping confidence")
ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "ed5a_mapping_score.pdf"), plot = p_score, h = 4, w = 5)
```
